note: Low-demand voltage condition proxied by high SA non-sync (wind+utility solar) penetration. AEMO's declared SA voltage-control gap binds under LOW DEMAND / high distributed-renewable conditions (2023 NSCAS Report). We do NOT use the AEMO directions 'reason' field: it is a report-template boilerplate constant within each report that steps strength(2021)->security(2021-11..2024-06)->voltage(2024-07+), perfectly time-confounded, NOT a per-direction physical cause.
